labor.s: Clean Clothes Campaign Transparency Pledge signatory (signed 2018) — committed to publishing tier-1 supplier list.

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

health.s: 3 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the recalled shelving units can be missing wall mounting hardware.

topHazards.label: The recalled shelving units can be missing wall mounting hardware, which is used to attach the shelving unit to the wall to prevent it from tipping or falling,…
The bread maker's lid can become energized, posing an electric shock hazard.
The wooden wheels can detach and release small parts, posing a choking hazard to young children.

sampleRecalls.title: Lidl US Recalls Powerfix Steel Shelving Units Due To Tip-Over and Entrapment Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Lidl's Powerfix Metal Shelving Units. They are 59 inches tall, stand upright, and contain four metal shelves. They come in a box marked with article number 314367 and UPC 4017239206062. One of the shelves in the unit is marked with a white sticker with the article number 314367.
hazards: The recalled shelving units can be missing wall mounting hardware, which is used to attach the shelving unit to the wall to prevent it from tipping or falling,…

sampleRecalls.title: Lidl US Recalls Silvercrest Bread Makers Due to Electric Shock Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Lidl's Silvercrest bread maker. It is a rectangular shaped white and silver appliance. The bread maker has an electronic display, buttons, and a lid on the top. Affected units have IAN 319996, IAN 304926, or IAN 295433 on a sticker on the bottom of each machine and on the product packaging. "Silve…
hazards: The bread maker's lid can become energized, posing an electric shock hazard.
injuries: There has been one incident of the bread maker becoming energized. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Lidl Recalls Wooden Grasping Toys Due to Choking Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall includes the Playtive Junior Wooden Grasping Toy. The grasping toy is made of wood in the shape of an elephant with four blue wheels on the bottom. There is a space in the center of the toy. The model number, HG04414, is located on the underside of the toy.
hazards: The wooden wheels can detach and release small parts, posing a choking hazard to young children.
